payload.answer: This appears to be a duplicate delivery of the same Slack event. No memory update is being performed here; please choose how to handle it.
repair_options: Ignore the repeated Slack event and make no change.
Treat the duplicate as the same source event and avoid creating a second memory.
If you believe these are actually two distinct events, review the source details before deciding whether to add anything.
